events.label: reasoning
events.text: We need answer JSON only. Need evaluate scenario: field method less tidy than preferred shop approach but matches listed product instructions and project requirement. No local amendment/drawing note forbids. References NEC Art. 408, 110.26, 200.4. Need decide pass/fail/needs_more_info. Since method matches product instructions and project requirements, no code violation. Tidy preference not enforceable. Working clearance not described as issue. So decision pass. Risk low. Work stage in-progress. Component conditions none. Percent complete maybe 60? Value 0. Sound_source etc default empty string? Schema says sound_source: component or source of sound, when asked. Not asked, can use "". confidence 0.95. event_time 0.0, rate 0.0, order empty list, workable empty list. Findings: none. Actions: none. Rationale: field method complies with manufacturer instructions and project requirements; neatness preference alone is not a code or specification basis for rejection. References: NEC Art. 408, 110.26, 200.4. Need ensure valid JSON.
